author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

COPA Registration Open

Attention all Star Atlas DACs  

Over $26,000 in Star Atlas land is up for grabs in this year's COPA. 

1st place: CSS Tier 3 ($17,000 Origination Price),2nd place: CSS Tier 2 ($7,900 Origination Price),3rd place: CSS Tier 1 ($1,369 Origination Price),
On February 29, DACs (Guilds) of Star Atlas will compete, showcasing what makes their DAC the best of the bunch.

 Register your DAC to present and learn more: https://www.staratlas.com/partnerships/copa-2024
